content.speakerText: I worked 5 extra hours this week. How will this be compensated?
content.speakerTextCn: 我这周加班了5个小时，这会怎么补偿？
expectedAnswers: You'll receive overtime pay at 1.5 times your regular rate.
We can schedule you for equivalent time off next week.
Either option works—I’ll update your timesheet and let HR know.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明补偿方式（加班费或调休），或提供选择
语言准确性：使用了 'overtime pay', 'time off', 'equivalent' 等关键词
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合职场对话习惯，避免生硬或命令式语气

content.speakerText: I'm not sure about our policy on weekend overtime. Could you clarify?
content.speakerTextCn: 我不太清楚公司关于周末加班的政策，您能说明一下吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! Weekend work is compensated at double time, or you can take two days off later.
Our policy allows for either overtime pay or compensatory time off—whichever you prefer.
I'll send you the official policy document. Generally, weekend hours are paid at 1.5x.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰解释补偿政策，回应了对方对政策的疑问
语言准确性：使用了 'overtime pay', 'compensatory time off', 'double time' 等专业词汇
表达自然度：语气友好、有帮助性，避免使用 'I don't know' 或推诿

content.scenarioHint: 员工刚完成周末加班，想礼貌询问主管加班补偿是按加班费还是调休计算
expectedAnswers: Could you please clarify how the overtime from this weekend will be compensated?
Just to check, will this be paid as overtime or given as time off?
I’d like to confirm—does company policy offer pay or compensatory time for weekend overtime?
What’s the standard compensation for weekend overtime—hourly pay or time off in lieu?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了加班补偿方式
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合职场英语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 overtime, compensated, pay, time off, policy 等关键词
